svg.title: Living + kitchen memory fragment (apartment four) - controlled, sparse, suspended
svg.desc: Looking straight into a tightly framed apartment that holds the kitchen and the living space at the same eye level. On the left, the right edge of a slim modern fridge anchors the kitchen; a clean counter sits beneath an upper cabinet, holding only three things: a small canister, a moka pot, and a single ceramic mug. In the center of the wall, a small window with a still outdoor view of distant rooftops under a flat sky. On the right, a wide wall-mounted television throws a muted blue-grey glow onto the surrounding wall and onto the corner of a slate-blue couch with a single warm throw pillow tucked into it. Lighting is even and cool. The moka pot is not steaming. Nothing animates.
